preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)

featureFlags._doc: Runtime feature flags read at Electron startup. Do NOT rely on these for security-critical defaults — a stale version.json on an offline client stays at the shipped values. Security-critical changes must land as code pushes with a version bump.

notes: v1.22.3: Hyper-performant archive + post-audit polish. Anchor: 2026-05-13. ARCHIVE PERF (RSI iter 1 — the centerpiece): five root-cause fixes targeting the archive + adjacent IPC hot paths flagged by a deep parallel performance audit. (1) In-memory walk cache in archive-scanner.js — scanArchive() returns the previous walk's items instantly when the watcher hasn't fired since; the watcher's onChange now calls invalidateScanCache() so file changes still trigger a fresh walk. Archive open drops from 400-800ms cold (200-500ms walk + 50-200ms get-live-ads + 100-200ms render) to <10ms on warm cache, ~50ms cold. (2) get-live-ads handler converted sync to async + parallel per-brand reads via Promise.all + LRU cache keyed by mtimeMs+size (cap 64 brands). 10-brand workspace all-brands view drops from 120-230ms main-thread block to ~20-30ms. (3) archive-changed broadcast now carries paths + truncated payload (capped at 200 entries) so the renderer can support incremental updates; bare fallback kept for back-compat. (4) Archive build loop converted from items.forEach + grid.appendChild x N to DocumentFragment batched first chunk (300 cards sync) + idle-time tail in 200-card chunks via requestIdleCallback. Initial paint on a 5000-asset brand drops from 200-500ms to ~30ms; the rest fills during idle frames; the existing isStale() race guard short-circuits stale idle callbacks. (5) get-activity-feed-full handler accepts an optional limit param (default 2000, max 50000) so the renderer no longer triggers a 300-850ms sync JSONL parse on the main process every search-all. RENDERER POLISH (RSI iter 2-3): approval countdown setInterval(1000) x 900 ticks replaced with a two-phase setTimeout chain (Phase 1 sleeps until the warning window; Phase 2 ticks once per second only while the final 60s are on screen — eliminates 840 wasted wakeups per modal). Wisdom cards Math.max-over-map collapsed into a single-pass maxVal() helper called once per array. Connection-status NodeList captured-once and reused across pre-paint / safety-timer / resolved branches (was: 3x querySelectorAll per brand change). EMQ AUDIT (PR #185): meta_audit MCP tool gains audit-events action for per-event Event Match Quality scores (mirrors Events Manager Data Sources EMQ column). Pixel detail call no longer requests the deprecated server_events_match_rate field (was returning HTTP 400 and tanking every audit-pixel call). Stats endpoint switched to explicit Unix start/end timestamps (Meta deprecated -7d relative shortcut). Plain-English findings: each event gets a Great (>=8) / Good (>=6) / Low (<6) grade with actionable fix advice (Low Purchase EMQ surfaces: Match quality is low — turn on Automatic Advanced Matching, verify CAPI sends hashed email + phone). COPY-BTN FIX (PR #258): inline copy buttons next to code blocks now show a visible Copied! toast on success and Copy failed on failure (was: silent 12px button-glyph swap with no .catch() — clicks looked like no-ops). Falls back to Electron native clipboard via merlin.copyText when navigator.clipboard rejects (Electron unfocused-window / strict origin policy). GO BINARY (RSI iter 3-4): four data-pulling handlers gained CLAUDE.md Dedup Contract declarations (runSEOCluster intentional non-dedup with 5k-query revisit threshold; runMetaAuditRetargetingCascade + runMetaAuditPixel live state check; pickRevenueSource intentional non-dedup with cross-pollution justification). New dedup_contract_test.go source-scans for the strategy markers so a future strip trips the build. TEST COVERAGE: 6 new copy-button tests, 12 new EMQ + time-window tests, 10 new archive-scanner cache tests, 8 new RSI iter 1 regression tests in renderer.test.js, 3 new RSI iter 2-3 polish tests, 1 new Go dedup-contract regression test. All 1190 autoCMO tests + full Go merlin/facts/factverify suite pass. EXPECTED USER-VISIBLE IMPACT: archive opens feel instant (~40-80x faster on warm cache, 8-16x cold). Live Ads tab paints 4-10x faster. Activity-feed search-all 6-17x faster. Generation-burst archive flicker eliminated (100-file write that used to cascade 5 reloads over 1.5-4 seconds now coalesces to 1 reload after burst settles). Copy buttons actually copy AND tell you they did.
whatsNew: Archive sidebar feels instant — opens in <50ms (was 400-800ms), scroll stays at 60fps on 5000+ assets
Live Ads + activity feed paint 4-17× faster; generation-run flicker is gone
Meta audit-events: see your per-event match quality (EMQ) right in chat — Great / Good / Low grade + plain-English fix advice
Copy buttons actually copy now — visible 'Copied!' toast on every click, with Electron clipboard fallback
Inline pixel diagnostics no longer 400 on Meta's deprecated server_events_match_rate field
